author: yaye.work
description: Create and edit a linked note inline, withot ever leaving the current note. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: yaye
manifest.description: Create and edit a linked note inline, right inside the parent note. Click the button next to any [[wikilink]] to expand a collapsible editor for that note without leaving your context.
manifest.name: Inline Note

name: Inline Note

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
Polish and fixes on top of 0.2.0.

- Removed the small title repeated at the top of each card — the link above it already names the note.
- Tightened line spacing in the idle (rendered) view; paragraphs no longer get full note-page margins inside a compact card.
- Clicking the empty space below an inline card that sits on a note's last line now starts a new line in the parent note, instead of doing nothing.
- Quieter: no more notices for reclaimed empty notes or for collapse-all finding nothing. Real errors still notify.
- The create-inline icon on links without a note is always visible (dimmed, brightening on hover) instead of appearing only on hover.

**Manual install:** copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/inline-note/`, then enable under Community plugins.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
A big step: inline notes now edit like real notes.

**Editing**
- Inline notes are edited with Obsidian's own embedded editor (the mechanism Canvas uses): live preview formatting (bold, italics, checkboxes, tables), native editor commands and hotkeys, the native link suggester, and native drag & drop. Falls back to a plain editor if that internal API is unavailable.
- Idle notes render as real markdown (reading view), including working image / PDF / note embeds. Click to edit, click away to render.

**Behavior**
- Only markdown notes are ever inlined — links to PDFs, images, and other files keep Obsidian's native behavior (fixes the garbled-binary bug).
- Empty notes the plugin created are reclaimed (moved to trash) when their body closes untouched, so accidental clicks don't leave stray blank notes.
- Long notes open in a fixed-height scrollable card.
- Drag files from the file explorer or your OS into an inline note.

**Keyboard**
- Tab after `]]` — create / toggle the inline note.
- Shift+Tab — collapse all inline notes (also in the command palette).

**Look**
- Card style by default: rounded corners, soft shadow, visible note title, round chevron toggle button. Inline notes default to collapsed.

**Manual install:** copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/inline-note/`, then enable under Community plugins.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
Maintenance release — no functional changes.

- Fix CSS lint warnings surfaced by Obsidian's plugin reviewer: use the `text-decoration` shorthand (the longhands are only partially supported on Obsidian 1.4.5) and drop an `!important` in favor of a higher-specificity selector.

**Manual install:** copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/inline-note/`, then enable under Community plugins.

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
First release of Inline Note.

- Expand any [[wikilink]] into an editable note body inline, without leaving the page.
- Inline notes are real Markdown files — backlinks and graph view work normally.
- Keyboard-first: Tab after `]]` cycles create / expand / collapse.
- Recursive nesting up to 5 levels; links inside inline notes render live-preview style.
- Three nesting styles: vertical accent line, card, or both.

**Manual install:** copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/inline-note/`, then enable under Community plugins.
